task_objective: Display the SDH-ludusavi plugin version in the existing Decky Versions panel and validate release metadata before packaging.
design_decisions: Resolve VCS development versions from Python package metadata when the metadata contains a .dev segment.
Resolve packaged release versions from matching plugin.json and package.json metadata so Decky archives expose the release version even without installed Python metadata.
Add sdh_ludusavi at the service boundary so the frontend continues to load all displayed versions from get_versions().
Fail packaging before archive creation when plugin.json and package.json versions are missing or mismatched.
results: Set plugin.json and package.json to release version 0.1.0.
Added SDH-ludusavi: <version> above Ludusavi and rclone in the frontend Versions panel.
Added resolver, service, frontend static, and packaging tests for the new behavior.
Validated the frontend build with the local Rollup binary because pnpm was not installed in this shell.
